sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Stade Rennais is in decent form with no losses in their last 3 matches (2 wins, 1 draw), though their defense has struggled, conceding in 4 of their last 5 games. RC Lens has shown stronger recent form with 3 wins in their last 5 matches, including a convincing 3-0 win over Lille, and they have a solid defensive record with only 5 goals conceded this season.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, RC Lens has the upper hand with 1 win and 1 draw. Matches between these teams tend to be low-scoring, with under 2.5 goals in their last 5 encounters, and Lens often scoring first.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Stade Rennais has scored 7 goals this season (10th in the league) but struggles to create big chances (14th). RC Lens also has 8 goals (7th in the league) and a better defensive record (5 goals conceded vs. Rennes' 8), indicating a slight edge in balance.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Rennes plays at home in Roazhon Park, which could provide a slight advantage, and they score late often (4 goals after the 76th minute). However, Lens’ in-form player Wesley Saïd (2 goals, 2 assists recently) and their tendency to dominate head-to-head games make them a threat.
